headline: AMC Entertainment's subsidiary Odeon entered into a commitment letter for a new $425 million senior secured credit facility to refinance its existing 2027 notes.
investor_impact: The $425 million refinancing extends Odeon's debt maturities from 2027 to 2031 and lowers the interest rate from 12.75% to 10.50%, significantly improving near-term liquidity and balance sheet health. The concurrent cancellation of a previously announced broader debt offering indicates a tactical shift in AMC's capital structure optimization strategy.
key_figures: 12.750% interest rate on existing Senior Secured Notes due 2027
10.50% fixed interest rate on new term loan
February 28, 2026 end date for Odeon revenue and attendance cleansing materials
